docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT SFCLT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LANDTRUST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF FRANK STROM APPEARED. DEFENDANT SFCLT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LANDTRUST, REPRESENTED BY KRISTEN NATION, STEWARDSHIP DIRECTOR. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SFCLT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LANDTRUST
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STROM, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT SFCLT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LANDTRUST
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STROM, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SFCLT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LANDTRUST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY STROM, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT SFCLT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LANDTRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STROM, FRANK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
